title: Vatican Museum and Sistine Chapel Skip The Line Tickets
description:
Experience the Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel without the wait. This skip-the-line ticket grants you priority access to one of the world's most visited attractions, allowing you to bypass the notoriously long queues and maximize your time exploring the incredible art and history within.

Marvel at Michelangelo's breathtaking frescoes on the Sistine Chapel ceiling, including the iconic Creation of Adam. Wander through the vast Vatican Museums, home to one of the most impressive art collections in the world, featuring works by Raphael, Caravaggio, Leonardo da Vinci, and countless other masters.

This is the perfect option for travelers who want the flexibility to explore at their own pace while avoiding the hassle of waiting in line.
highlights: Skip the long entrance queues with priority access
Explore the Vatican Museums at your own pace
See masterpieces by Raphael, Caravaggio, and more
Access to the Gallery of Maps and Raphael Rooms
Flexible entry time within your selected slot
includes: Skip-the-line entrance ticket to Vatican Museums
importantInfo: Dress code: Shoulders and knees must be covered for entry
Large bags and backpacks are not permitted
Photography without flash is allowed in most areas
No photography in the Sistine Chapel
Ticket is valid only for the selected date and time slot
Please arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled time
Last entry is 2 hours before closing time
meetingPoint: Vatican Museums entrance, Viale Vaticano, 00165 Roma RM, Italy

itinerary.title: Vatican Museums Entrance
itinerary.description: Skip the regular queue and enter through the priority access lane. Pass through security screening and collect your audio guide if desired.

itinerary.title: Gallery of Maps & Tapestries
itinerary.description: Begin your journey through the Gallery of Maps, featuring stunning topographical maps of Italy. Continue to the Gallery of Tapestries with magnificent woven artworks.

itinerary.title: Raphael Rooms
itinerary.description: Explore the four rooms decorated by Raphael and his students, including the famous School of Athens fresco.

itinerary.title: Sistine Chapel
itinerary.description: Enter the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel and gaze upon Michelangelo's masterpiece ceiling frescoes, including The Creation of Adam and The Last Judgment.

itinerary.title: Additional Collections
itinerary.description: Explore other sections at your leisure, including the Pinacoteca art gallery, Egyptian Museum, and classical sculpture collections.

cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the experience starts
